author: gb9t
content:
Phase C started 2026-05-09. Component-level Tier-3 design docs in dependency order.

Strategy: start with lib/data-structures.md (used by every higher-tier subsystem), then arch/x86/{boot,entry,paging,kernel-platform}.md (the substrate). After foundational docs, mm/ + kernel/ Tier-3s, then up the stack.

Each Tier-3 doc follows the standard template + the new mandatory Hardening section per 00-security-principles.md. Cites this binding policy doc rather than restating defaults.

Session focus this turn: lib/data-structures.md and at least one arch/x86 Tier-3 doc.
